scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:passenger" "npm run dev:driver" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:passenger: cd apps/passenger-web && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:driver: cd apps/driver-web && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:admin: cd apps/admin-dashboard && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:apps: npm run build:passenger && npm run build:driver && npm run build:admin
scripts.build:passenger: cd apps/passenger-web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:driver: cd apps/driver-web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:admin: cd apps/admin-dashboard && npm install && npm run build
